required_inputs: request intent and requested reporting, disclosure, publication, or submission action
lane scope, adjacent specialist map, statutory authority boundary, and signoff matrix
tenant public records, privacy, procurement, audit, and adjudication boundaries
refusal_triggers: request asks for eligibility, permit, enforcement, procurement award, public records release, audit finding, legal interpretation, or final publication authority
request seeks unsupported publication, policy, causal, or rights-sensitive claim
request bypasses mandatory record, source, disclosure, or signoff gates

required_inputs: authoritative public source set
source freshness and last-review metadata
tenant source precedence, jurisdiction, program, and publication rules
refusal_triggers: required statute, agency guidance, metric dictionary, or tenant source context is missing
public instructions and tenant policy materially conflict
source freshness no longer supports confident reporting

required_inputs: program, population, period, and report identifiers
case files, eligibility records, permits, notices, procurement records, correspondence, and audit trails
system-of-record references, retrieval timestamps, and record owners
refusal_triggers: critical official records are missing or unverifiable
artifacts cannot be tied to a named system of record or owner
requested reporting claim is not supported by traceable evidence

required_inputs: case management, records management, procurement, permits, grants, public-service administration, reporting, and open data system inventory
record locations, retrieval hooks, and official owner map
reviewer, signoff, and publication dependencies
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
record location or retrieval hook is unknown
review, publication, records, or adjudication owner is unresolved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
source, policy, data quality, and authority conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, source record, or authority context is unknown
conflicting policy or source interpretation remains unresolved
required signoff or records review is missing for the requested action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact requirements and owner map
required_outputs: handoff package with evidence and blockers
refusal_triggers: request is outside public data reporting ownership
request requires program adjudication, legal, public records, procurement, audit, privacy, security, or publication authority
request requires official policy interpretation or final signoff

required_inputs: requested metric, report, or disclosure target
population, period, numerator, denominator, exclusions, cadence, and source hierarchy
authoritative public guidance and tenant metric dictionary
refusal_triggers: metric definition is ambiguous or disputed
source records do not support the requested metric
publication audience or source hierarchy is unresolved

required_inputs: validated source records and metric definitions
submission template, reporting cadence, disclosure audience, and caveat requirements
reviewer and signoff dependencies
required_outputs: analysis or report output with caveats and confidence notes
refusal_triggers: submission inputs are incomplete or conflicting
official records or signoff evidence is missing
reporting package would imply unsupported certainty or approval

required_inputs: requested claim or disclosure
evidence set and source tie-out
claim category, audience, and decision boundary
refusal_triggers: claim is causal, policy, legal, fairness, eligibility, enforcement, or compliance-sensitive without support
requested claim is not fully supported by the evidence set
stakeholder asks to omit material caveats or data-quality limits

required_inputs: jurisdiction, statute, regulation, program guidance, and agency policy context
authority boundary and authorized approver map
public obligation, reporting mandate, and due-date context
refusal_triggers: statutory interpretation determines the reporting output
official adjudication, enforcement, public records, procurement, or publication authority is requested
public guidance and tenant policy materially conflict

required_inputs: eligibility, benefit, permit, notice, appeal, enforcement, or rights-sensitive context
case file, notice, correspondence, and audit trail records
program adjudication, legal, and authorized official owner map
refusal_triggers: rights, benefits, permits, enforcement, or public obligations depend on interpretation or official determination
notice, appeal, correspondence, or case-file record is missing
request asks the lane to impersonate official adjudication or enforcement authority
